<tr><td>

[compute(store, callback)](./openrct2-flexui.compute.md)


</td><td>

Creates a new store that subscribes itself to all specified parent stores through a one-way binding. If one of the parent stores dispatches an update, the new store recomputes itself automatically and will notify its subscribers of the change.


</td></tr>

<tr><td>

[format(format, store)](./openrct2-flexui.format.md)


</td><td>

Create a formatted string that subscribes itself to all specified parent stores through a one-way binding. If one of the parent stores dispatches an update, the store with the formatted string reformats itself automatically and will notify its subscribers of the string.

Tip: Stores work best if you only use them for binding a model to your user interface, and nowhere else.

This utility store uses OpenRCT2's `context.formatString()` under the hood, and thus supports the same tokens, for example: \* Numbers: `{COMMA32}`<!-- -->, `{INT32}`<!-- -->, `COMMA2DP32` \* Strings: `{STRING}` \* Localised strings: `{STRINGID}` \* Localised currency: `{CURRENCY}`<!-- -->, `{CURRENCY2DP}` \* Localised in-game dates: `{MONTH}`<!-- -->, `{MONTHYEAR}`<!-- -->, `{REALTIME}`<!-- -->, `{DURATION}` \* Localised ride metrics: `{LENGTH}`<!-- -->, `{VELOCITY}` \* Inline sprites: `{SPRITE}`<!-- -->, `{INLINE_SPRITE}` \* Colours: `{RED}`<!-- -->, `{YELLOW}`<!-- -->, `{WINDOW_COLOUR_1}` \* Font sizes: `{MEDIUMFONT}`<!-- -->, `{SMALLFONT}`<!-- -->, `{TINYFONT}`


</td></tr>

[WritableStore](./openrct2-flexui.writablestore.md)


</td><td>

A mutable object that can be subscribed to and whose subscriptions will be notified when the value has changed.

Tip: Stores work best if you only use them for binding a model to your user interface, and nowhere else.


</td></tr>

## Type Aliases

<table><thead><tr><th>

Type Alias


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[AbsoluteLayoutContainer](./openrct2-flexui.absolutelayoutcontainer.md)


</td><td>

Array of widgets created that are positioned at absolute locations.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Bindable](./openrct2-flexui.bindable.md)


</td><td>

A value that can either be a constant or a store value.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[DropdownDisableMode](./openrct2-flexui.dropdowndisablemode.md)


</td><td>

Automatically disable the dropdown if it is empty, or has a single item at most.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ElementVisibility](./openrct2-flexui.elementvisibility.md)


</td><td>

Whether the element is visible, hidden or gone completely.

Note: `hidden` elements still take up space, `none` elements do not.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[FlexibleLayoutContainer](./openrct2-flexui.flexiblelayoutcontainer.md)


</td><td>

Array of widgets for use in a flexible layout container.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[FrameEvent](./openrct2-flexui.frameevent.md)


</td><td>

All available events for controls to subscribe to. - `open`<!-- -->: is triggered when the window or tab is opened by the user. - `redraw`<!-- -->: is triggered whenever a redraw is started. Widget groups can use this to update their size and position relative to any child widget changes. - `update`<!-- -->: is triggered every frame (as in frames per second) while the window or tab is open. Be careful with heavy usage. - `close`<!-- -->: is triggered when the window is closed by the user.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Padding](./openrct2-flexui.padding.md)


</td><td>

Specifies the padding to use on each of the four sides of a rectangle area.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Parsed](./openrct2-flexui.parsed.md)


</td><td>

All values of type `T` parsed to `[number, ScaleType]`<!-- -->-tuples.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[ParsedScale](./openrct2-flexui.parsedscale.md)


</td><td>

A scale value split into the hard number and its type.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[Scale](./openrct2-flexui.scale.md)


</td><td>

Specifies the scale of a specific property. The value can be either a string or a number. String values can be either pixels, percentages, weighted values or 'inherit'. - \*\*Pixels:\*\* absolute position or size, like standard widgets; - \*\*Percentages:\*\* position or size relative to the leftover space within the parent; - \*\*Weighted:\*\* position or size relative to the total weight of all weighted elements within the parent, applied to the leftover space within the parent.

\*\*Leftover space\*\* is all space within the parent after subtracting any absolute sized widgets within the parent.

\*\*Example usage:\*\* \* `var absolute = "50px";` - Always 50 pixels regardless of parent size. \* `var percentage = "20%";` - If the parent has no absolute sized widgets: (150 \* 0.2) = 30 pixels; - If the parent has another widget with the absolute size of "50px": the leftover space is (150 - 50) = 100 pixels, and the size of the percentage sized widget is then (100 \* 0.2) = 20 pixels. \* `var weighted = "1w";` - If this is the only widget within the parent: 150 pixels; - If the parent has one other widget sized at "50px": 100 pixels; which is 100% of the leftover space. - If the parent has 2 widgets sized at "1w" and 1 widget at "30px": both weighted widgets will get 50% each of the leftover space, which is ((150 - 30px) \* (1w / 2w)) = 60 pixels. The 2 here is the total weight over all the weighted elements within the parent. \* `var number = 10;` - Number values are always interpreted as absolute pixel values.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[SpinnerWrapMode](./openrct2-flexui.spinnerwrapmode.md)


</td><td>

Determines whether the spinner value wraps around or clamps to its boundaries.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[TabCreator](./openrct2-flexui.tabcreator.md)


</td><td>

Write the specified tab to the output. Should return a layoutable control that can draw the widgets to a specified area.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[TextColour](./openrct2-flexui.textcolour.md)


</td><td>

All the available text colours in OpenRCT2.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[TwoWayBindable](./openrct2-flexui.twowaybindable.md)


</td><td>

A value that can either be a constant, a regular store, or a store marked for two-way binding.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[WidgetCreator](./openrct2-flexui.widgetcreator.md)


</td><td>

Write all widgets required by the params to the output. Returns an interface that can draw the widgets to a specified area.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[WidgetMap](./openrct2-flexui.widgetmap.md)


</td><td>

Defines a dictionary set that contains active or description widgets by name.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[WidgetParams](./openrct2-flexui.widgetparams.md)


</td><td>

The parameters for configuring a custom widget.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
